programme.title: Date My House
programme.sub-title: Kayla & Ryan’s Toddler To-Do List
programme.desc: Kayla and Ryan have a newborn and a toddler and need both functionality and style in their space.

programme.desc: Levi Kelly explores tiny BNB's, from snow covered yurts to reimagined shipping containers.

programme.title: Down to the Studs
programme.sub-title: Culinary Condo Remodel
programme.desc: Amy turns a tiny condo into a home that supports Sandra's love for cooking and entertaining.

programme.title: Apartment Therapy
programme.sub-title: Erin + Jesse: An Attic Transformed
programme.desc: Armed with fresh ideas, Charli and Kylie turn a forgotten attic into a welcoming flex room.

programme.sub-title: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined
programme.desc: Kylie and Charli bring smart solutions, bold materials, and thoughtful styling to a first home.

programme.sub-title: Shalese + Irene: A Bedroom That Is Just Right
programme.desc: Charli and Kylie transform Irene’s closet and turn her bedroom into a beautiful retreat.

programme.sub-title: Meet the Neighbors
programme.desc: Hosts Tyler and Rachel kick off the competition by introducing the four teams and assigning their first challenge.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.sub-title: Place It & Plant It
programme.desc: The teams race through the local nursery to find the perfect plants to bring life to their budding backyard designs.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.sub-title: Ultimate Upcycles
programme.desc: Tyler and Rachel challenge the teams to select items to upcycle and repurpose in their backyard designs.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.sub-title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the teams strap on their toolbelts and plan their backyards builds.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.sub-title: Mastering the Menu
programme.desc: The judges challenge the remaining teams to craft and present a unique menu for a backyard party.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.sub-title: Best on the Block
programme.desc: The remaining two teams prepare their winning menus for the final challenge.

programme.sub-title: Burgers and Babka: Viral Sensations

programme.sub-title: Melba Wilson: A Harlem Icon
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Melba Wilson schools Matthew on the art of her legendary shrimp and grits.

programme.sub-title: Carnie Wilson: Rock Royalty's Infamous Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Matthew visits Carnie Wilson's Los Angeles home to whip up her Fall-to-Your-Knees Mac and Cheese.

programme.sub-title: Mid-Century Palm Springs Style
programme.desc: Michelle Boudreau celebrates the Palm Springs lifestyle in this mid-century modern abode.

programme.sub-title: Montauk-Inspired Calibu Vineyard

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.sub-title: It’s a Mood: Cara Woodhouse’s Noyack Cottage
programme.desc: Step inside Noyack Cottage, a stunning Sag Harbor vacation home transformed by Cara Woodhouse.

programme.sub-title: Historical Modern Heirloom Estate
programme.desc: Anne-Marie Barton invites you through the gate to this stately, traditional yet modern home.

programme.sub-title: Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes
programme.desc: Jillian visits two homeowners who have taken containers—and creativity—to extraordinary new heights.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes
programme.desc: Jillian explores some of the most whimsical homes in Southern California.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Jillian learns how history inspires the future, touring boundary-pushing homes with a modern twist.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: Off-Grid Living: The Creative Space
programme.desc: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.

programme.sub-title: Mid-Century Palm Springs Style
programme.desc: Michelle Boudreau celebrates the Palm Springs lifestyle in this mid-century modern abode.
